case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS LONG LIFE NOODLE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LONG LIFE NOODLE COMPANY
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LONG LIFE NOODLE COMPANY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $851.29 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT LONG LIFE NOODLE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LONG LIFE NOODLE COMPANY $851.29 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $921.29 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,078.29 AS TO DEFENDANT LONG LIFE NOODLE COMPANY
